title: lindsaea monocarpa
intro: Lindsaea monocarpa, also known as the single-fruited lindsaea, is a species of fern in the family Lindsaeaceae. It is native to Australia and is known for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Lindsaea monocarpa include its ability to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Lindsaea monocarpa is traditionally prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used as a poultice or applied topically to affected areas.
